title: Ender's Pirate Armory
description: A pack that changes models and textures of various items, mostly relating to combat. This pack may not work properly in versions below 1.21.4.
body:
A pirate themed pack that changes models and textures of various items, mostly relating to combat.
The armor doubles as unobtrusive armor pack as well, as much of the skin isnt covered by the armor texture!

Items included are; all swords, all axes, all armor, turtle helmet, mace, fishing rod, potions, totem, shield, arrows, bows, crossbows, buckets, tnt, and elytra.

-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-

**This pack may not work properly in versions below 1.21.4.**
